scientific_scope: Corrective family-bound computation on already-burned tapes. Not a confirmatory Paper 2 result and not domain validation of a real cross-stage team.

physics.efficacy_and_signal_parameters: unchanged from paper2_bottleneck_high_authority_v1; no parameter sweep
physics.researcher_extension_warning: One fungible plant/LOC/theatre response team is not established by the thesis and still requires Garrido sign-off.

resource_envelope.response_team: exactly one team-week in every epoch, 4032 team-hours per 24-week episode
resource_envelope.allocation_destinations: M/T/R hours are mutually exclusive uses of the same team, not separate purchased budgets

reserve.interpretation: Reserve issue is endogenous service from fixed available system stock. Automatic reserve replenishment is an internal conserved transfer from the MFSC, not exogenous resource creation.

resource_envelope.matching_rule: All calendars receive identical initial stock, exogenous production, reserve capacity/target/replenishment physics and team-hours. Any external stock creation, unequal dispatch purchase or mass residual fails the contract.

complete_open_loop_family.definition: Every 24-week requested M/T/R calendar whose active week 0 is M and whose active allocation does not switch in adjacent weeks.

calibration_frontier.use: enumerate every feasible calendar and select the maximum calibration-mean canonical ReT, with deterministic tie breaks by guardrails then lexicographic calendar

locked_bound.use: evaluate the calibration-selected complete-frontier calendar and the exact per-tape feasible oracle; compute paired H_PI and guardrail differences

complete_open_loop_family.selection_bias_direction: Independent calibration selection can only weaken the comparator relative to the true best expected open-loop schedule; therefore a locked H_PI upper confidence bound below the practical gate remains a conservative family closure.

exact_acceleration_requirements.state_merge_rule: Prefixes may merge only under a proved sufficient Markov key that preserves every future transition, RNG/exogenous continuation, unresolved order, scheduled process, inventory/resource state, and sufficient statistic needed for the final visible-ledger primary and every guardrail.
proof_obligations: Document every key field and every deliberately excluded mutable field.
Include pending SimPy event/process continuations or prove that deterministic prefix replay plus the key makes them redundant.
Include canonical visible-ledger history sufficient statistics and every unresolved order state; an inventory-only key is invalid.
For every merged state in the collision suite, replay every feasible next action and compare the next key and all final endpoints exactly.
Re-run selected calibration winner and every locked oracle winner through the unaccelerated run_policy implementation.
Report approximation gap exactly zero; otherwise the result is not a ceiling.
exact_acceleration_requirements.failure_rule: Any state-key collision with a different next transition, terminal endpoint, order ledger, resource ledger or exogenous hash invalidates the acceleration and leaves the family active_for_bound.

inference.boundary_close_rule: resource-restricted H_PI UCB95 < 0.01, or every oracle improvement violates a mandatory guardrail/resource constraint
inference.observable_promote_rule: not evaluated unless H_PI LCB95 >= 0.01 and every pre-learner physical/resource/guardrail gate remains viable
